close_reason: Added AlgorithmMismatch variant to SecretError; all three constructors now use it
description: All three Signer::new() constructors return SecretError::InvalidUri when the backend algorithm doesn't match. InvalidUri is defined as 'URI was syntactically invalid or named an unknown/disabled backend.' Algorithm mismatch at construction time is neither. Callers that match on SecretError::InvalidUri to detect URI problems will silently swallow algorithm mismatches and vice versa. A new variant (e.g. SecretError::AlgorithmMismatch) or SecretError::Backend with a descriptive source should be used instead.
title: SecretError::InvalidUri misused for algorithm mismatch
